displayTitle: The Clone Wars S01E18: Mystery of a Thousand Moons
synopsis: The fatal Blue Shadow Virus is released, infecting Ahsoka, Padmé and many Clone Troopers - and giving Anakin and Obi-Wan just 48 hours to find the antidote on a mysterious planet from which no visitor has ever returned.
title: The Clone Wars S01E18: Mystery of a Thousand Moons
